mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_type, m.content, DATE_FORMAT(m.create_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDate, g.image_url FROM messages m LEFT JOIN generated_images g ON m.id = g.message_id WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.create_date ASC
SELECT id, name, description, room_type, room_id FROM chat_rooms WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, image_url, actual_prompt FROM generated_images WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND image_type = #{imageType} ORDER BY create_date DESC

SELECT m.id, m.content, cr.name as room_name FROM messages m JOIN chat_rooms cr ON m.room_id = cr.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.room_type = 'card' AND m.sender_type = 'BOT' ORDER BY m.create_date DESC
SELECT id, name, description, room_id FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_type, m.content, cr.name FROM messages m LEFT JOIN chat_rooms cr ON m.room_id = cr.id WHERE m.id = #{scriptId}
SELECT id, user_id, image_url, thumbnail_url, actual_prompt, CONCAT('캐릭터_', id) AS characterName FROM generated_images WHERE id = #{charId} AND image_type = 'character'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages SET room_id = #{roomId}, sender_type = #{senderType}, content = #{content}, has_reference = 'N', create_date = NOW()

INSERT INTO generated_images SET message_id = #{messageId}, user_id = #{userId}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, actual_prompt = #{actualPrompt}, is_bookmark = 'N', image_type = #{imageType}, create_date = NOW()
